The paper does not claim novelty beyond incremental improvement and references related work.

Metrics are clearly defined and consistently reported throughout the paper.
The paper reports means and standard deviations but does not mention confidence intervals or number of seeds.
There is no evidence of implementation drift; the described method matches the reported experiments.
No evidence of data leakage or contamination is present; simulated data is clearly described.
There is no indication of test-case exploitation or special-casing of test inputs.
No tool-call misuse or fabrication is described or implied in the methodology.
The reward is based on proxies (implicit signals), which could be gamed, but there is no evidence of intentional tampering.
All experiments described appear to have been run, with results and figures provided.
All citations appear plausible and relevant; no fabricated or hijacked citations are evident.
No confidence intervals or error bars are reported, so fake CIs are not present.
Reported improvements are moderate and consistent with the data; no overclaiming is evident.
The paper does not mention any negative or non-significant results, which may indicate omission.
Figure descriptions match the reported data and do not over-interpret results.
Some implementation details (e.g., exact simulation of developer feedback) are not fully specified.
No reviewer recommendations or integrity concerns are present in the paper.
There is no evidence of unverified or unchecked cited claims.
No evidence of intentional underperformance or sandbagging is present.
No evidence of sabotage or intentional injection of misleading content is present.
The objectives and conclusions are consistent and traceable throughout the paper.
